# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Make the QR builder feel trustworthy by ensuring every control visibly changes the QR preview, while also improving the use of available space.

## Success Criteria

- Changing QR style updates the preview.
- Changing QR/background colors updates the preview.
- The QR section feels less sparse and better balanced.

## UX Notes

- Keep the builder clean and product-like.
- The preview should remain the visual focus.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- The styling library may require a more explicit re-render/update path than the initial implementation.
